title: Solo (disambiguation)
content:
[[File:HanSoloTFA-SWCT.png|thumb|right|300px|Han Solo]]
'''Solo''' may refer to one of the following:

==[[In-universe]]==
===[[Canon]]===
*'''[[Solo family]]'''
**'''[[Han Solo]]'''
**'''[[Leia Skywalker Organa Solo]]'''
**'''[[Ben Solo]]'''
*'''[[Jonashe Solo]]''', alleged ancestor of Han Solo
*'''[[Solo (star)]]'''
*[[Kylo Ren's lightsaber|'''Ben Solo's lightsaber''']]

===[[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]]===
*[[Jonash e Solo]]
*[[Jonash Solo]]
*[[Dalla Solo]]
*[[Denn Solo]]
*'[[Solo family/Legends|''House of Solo''']]
**'[[Allana Djo Solo|''Allana Solo''']], the daughter of Jacen Solo and [[Tenel Ka Djo]]
**'''[[Ania Solo]]''', a descendant of Han Solo and Leia Organa Solo
**'''[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]'''
**'''[[Thrackan Sal-Solo]]'''
**'[[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|''Leia Organa Solo''']]
**'''[[Solo twins]]'''
***'''[[Jaina Solo Fel]]'''
***'''[[Darth Caedus]]''', born as '''Jacen Solo'''
**'''[[Anakin Solo]]'''
**'''[[Tira Gama Solo]]'''
*'''[[Solo Fleet]]''', the task force assigned to hunt for Warlord [[Zsinj]].
*'''''[[Anakin Solo (starship)|Anakin Solo]]''''', an [[Imperial II-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial II''-class Star Destroyer]] named after Anakin Solo.
*'''[[Anakin Solo's lightsaber]]'''
*'''[[Jacen Solo's lightsaber]]'''
*'''[[Jaina Solo's lightsaber]]'''
*'[[Leia's lightsaber/Legends|''Leia Organa Solo's lightsabers''']]

==Real world==
*'''''[[Solo: A Star Wars Story]]''''', the film.
*'''''[[The Art of Solo: A Star Wars Story]]''''', an art book based off the film of the same name.
*'''''[[Solo: A Star Wars Story: Expanded Edition]]''''', the novelization based off the film of the same name.
**Its '''[[Solo: A Star Wars Story: Expanded Edition (audiobook)|audiobook edition]]'''
*'''''[[Solo: A Star Wars Story: A Junior Novel]]''''', the junior novelization based off the film of the same name.
**Its '''[[Solo: A Star Wars Story: A Junior Novel (audiobook)|audiobook edition]]'''
*'''''[[Solo: A Star Wars Story – The Official Collector's Edition]]''''', commemorative issue of ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'' that covers elements of the film.
*'''''[[Solo: A Star Wars Story The Official Guide]]''''', a [[:Category:Star Wars Visual Dictionaries|visual dictionary]] for the film of the same name.
*'''''[[Solo: A Star Wars Story Adaptation]]''''', the comic book adaptation of the film of the same name.
*'''''[[Solo: A Star Wars Story: Meet the Crew]]''''', a young-readers book introducing the main characters of the film.

==See also==
*'''[[Sol (disambiguation)]]'''
